EmailTemplate.description: Confirmation that we cannot provide direct debit receipts but that Close Brothers can provide a payment schedule.
EmailTemplate.name: DD Receipt No
EmailTemplate.subject: Request for Receipts
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
Unfortunately, we are unable to provide receipts for the Direct Debit individual payments.
Alternatively, please refer to your Close Brothers welcome pack which contains a payment schedule which may meet your requirements or the invoice provided by us via email for your policy premium when you purchased your policy.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
